theme: Brand & Positioning — brand-system v3 delta: dark-mode-first hero band (operator-chosen at this session's gate)
change_summary: Made the above-fold hero an always-dark band (conviction register, Hermes/Linear) by scoping the existing `dark` class to the hero <section> so the AA-verified .dark token resolutions (tokens.css + branding.css) cascade to that subtree only — no new hero-specific color tokens (reuse over fork). Added a hairline border-bottom seam for a deliberate dark-hero -> light-body transition, one quiet teal radial signal-glow for depth (color-mix var(--brand-primary) 20%, transparent; within the <=2-color palette), and swapped the demoted banner's black-based shadow for a teal-tinted glow (visible on dark). Body keeps theme parity (light default). Documented the delta in visual-identity-v2 sec.7 (same-commit provenance per change discipline).

doctrine_compliance.above_fold_one_focus: unchanged — words lead; dark stage reinforces focus, no new competing element
doctrine_compliance.two_colors_max: teal signal + amber accent unchanged; glow is teal-tinted (no new fighting color)
doctrine_compliance.motion_budget: no new motion this cycle (the one meaningful motion = sec.1 network diagram, cycle 144)
doctrine_compliance.dial: ~55/45 — dark register nudges conviction slightly without adding marketing copy
doctrine_compliance.light_parity: body sections follow user theme; .dark scoped to hero only

decision.hero_register: DARK-MODE-FIRST (operator-selected this session over keep-light/defer). Implemented as always-dark hero band + light body parity (vs full-site dark-first, which would lose docs-credibility light reading).

validation.astro_build: PASS — 161 pages, 5.26s, 0 errors (npx astro build, prebuild skipped to avoid vaults.json date churn)
validation.contrast: reuses AA-verified .dark tokens (heading hsl(0 0% 96%) on bg hsl(0 0% 8%); muted lead 60%; .dark .btn-primary = #0D7377 + white)
validation.reduced_motion: no added animation; global tokens.css reduced-motion block intact
validation.persona_qa: deferred to E1 decadal Reviewer Lens Pass (mandatory Visual Designer + Brand Strategist + Motion Designer)

deploy: deferred to this session's combined deploy after sec.1 + sec.2 land (dark hero supersedes cycle-2 light banner-demote)
notes: Cycle 3 of E1. First brand-system v3 delta. Reuse-first: leaned entirely on the pre-existing .dark token system + DarkModeToggle rather than authoring parallel hero tokens.
